problem id: a88c4f08
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00110000 -> 11000011
  01100001 -> 10000010
  00010001 -> 01000101
  11110010 -> 11000111
  01111011 -> 11101011
  01000011 -> 00001000
  00100000 -> 10000010
  10010000 -> 01001001

query: 10001110
predicted answer: 00110000
